parameters.query: SELECT "serverTimestamp" FROM "ChatMessage" WHERE "streamId" = '{{ $json.body.streamId }}' ORDER BY "serverTimestamp" ASC;

INSERT INTO "StreamHighlight" (id, "streamId", summary, "peakViewers", "totalMessages", "durationSeconds", "createdAt") VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), '{{ $json.streamId }}', '{{ $json.summary }}', {{ $('Webhook Trigger').first()?.json?.body?.peakViewers || 0 }}, {{ $json.totalCount }}, {{ $('Webhook Trigger').first()?.json?.body?.durationSeconds || 0 }}, '{{ new Date().toISOString() }}') ON CONFLICT ("streamId") DO UPDATE SET summary = EXCLUDED.summary, "totalMessages" = EXCLUDED."totalMessages", "durationSeconds" = EXCLUDED."durationSeconds";

parameters.notice: No chat activity during stream — skipping highlight generation.
